_note: Sanitized/representative export for the public POC; no production data, credentials, private indicators, or live-access details are included.

exposure_context.assessment: RDP has historically been a top ransomware initial-access and lateral-movement vector.
exposure_context.legacy_constraint: win-legacy-01 is constrained and cannot take the modern endpoint baseline.

confidence.rationale: ATT&CK mapping is direct, the platform is Windows, and the exposure is on the constrained legacy host; actor attribution is not required to elevate a lateral-movement front door.
